title: Nextflow pipeline parameters
description: This pipeline uses Nextflow and processes some kind of data. The JSON Schema was built using the nf-core pipeline schema builder.

input_parameters.title: Input Parameters
input_parameters.description: Paths and settings for specifying input genotype data. Provide either pfile_template, vcf_template, or npz_template, not multiple.

pfile_template.description: template for PLINK2 .pfiles (without extension), using '{CHR}' as a placeholder e.g. '/home/data/g1k.chr{CHR}'. Mutually exclusive with vcf_template and npz_template.

vcf_template.description: template for VCF files (with .vcf or .vcf.gz extension), using '{CHR}' as a placeholder e.g. '/home/data/g1k.chr{CHR}'. VCF files will be automatically converted to pgen format. Mutually exclusive with pfile_template and npz_template.

npz_template.description: template for NPZ LD matrix files (with .npz extension), using '{CHR}' and '{CHUNK}' as placeholders e.g. '/home/data/chr{CHR}_{CHUNK}.npz'. Companion .gz variant files must exist with same basename. Mutually exclusive with pfile_template and vcf_template.

chroms.description: comma-separated list of chromosomes to process (e.g. '1,2,X,Y'). If not provided, defaults to all autosomes plus X and Y.

extract.description: file with list of variants IDs to include'

exclude.description: file with list of variants IDs to exclude'

keep.description: file with list of sample IDs to subset to (must have two columns FID and IID)'

output_options.title: Output options
output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should save output data.

outdir.description: Output directory where the results will be saved

prefix.description: Prefix for output compressed LDZip files

stage_pgen.description: Whether to stage converted pgen files to outdir (only applicable when using vcf_template)

stage_plink.description: Whether to stage intermediate PLINK LD files to outdir

stage_binary.description: Whether to stage intermediate binary matrix files to outdir (only applicable when using npz_template)

stage_chunk.description: Whether to stage compressed LDZip chunk files to outdir

stage_chr.description: Whether to stage per-chromosome concatenated LDZip files to outdir

plink_ld_parameters.title: Plink LD parameters
plink_ld_parameters.description: Options passed to PLINK for computing pairwise LD statistics.

ld_command.description: string to be passed to plink2 for LD calculation. All LD statistics output by plink2 will be compressed

ld_filter.description: variant filtering options to apply before LD calculation (e.g., '--maf 0.0001' for minor allele frequency filtering, '--geno 0.1' for missingness, etc.)

ld_threads.description: number of CPU threads to use for PLINK LD calculations.

ld_window_kb.description: genomic distance window (in kilobases) for calculating LD between variant pairs.

ld_window_r2.description: minimum r² value threshold; pairs with lower r² are excluded from output.

chunk_size_kb.description: chunk size in kilobases for parallelization within chromosomes. If not specified, defaults to 2 * ld_window_kb.

overlap_size_kb.description: overlap size in kilobases between adjacent chunks. If not specified, defaults to ld_window_kb.

ld_compression_parameters.title: LD Compression Parameters
ld_compression_parameters.description: Settings controlling the compression of Linkage Disequilibrium (LD) matrices.

bits.description: number of bits used to quantize each LD value. [Use 99 for storing raw 32-bit float without quantization].

min.description: minimum absolute LD value to store; values below this threshold are set to zero to reduce file size.

min_col.description: column (LD statistic type) on which to apply the min threshold (only applicable when using pfile_template/vcf_template)

npz_ld_type.description: LD statistic type to compress from NPZ files (only applicable when using npz_template)

concat_pairwise.description: whether to use staggered pairwise concatenation before chromosome concatenation. Required when three or more consecutive chunks have overlapping regions, as ldzip concat cannot handle this case directly.
